name: Beet and Tomato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a baking dish.
2. Add half of the diced boiled beets to the bottom of the prepared dish.
3. Sprinkle with half of the stewed tomatoes, then half of the grated cheese.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Spread half of the bread crumbs over the vegetables and cheese.
6. Dot with 1 tablespoon of fat (butter or margarine).
7. Repeat steps 4-6.
8. Bake in a moderate oven at 350°F for 20 minutes.
Tootie Notes: This was the old recipe. To update, use a sprayed glass casserole dish and canned beets and tomatoes. Sliced beets lay out better in the dish. Reduce salt. Use butter or margarine instead of fat. This is steamy good.
